title: strychnos nigritana
intro: Strychnos nigritana, also known as the African strychnine tree, is a plant species native to West Africa, characterized by its toxic seeds and medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids, including strychnine, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Strychnos nigritana include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve rheumatic pains, and treat snake bites. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds are often dried, powdered, and used to create tonics and remedies, although caution is advised due to the presence of toxic compounds.
